mapper.sql: id, type_id, value_code, value_name, parent_code, level, sort_order, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT lv. FROM lookup_value lv INNER JOIN lookup_type lt ON lv.type_id = lt.id WHERE lt.type_code = #{typeCode} AND lv.delete_flag = 0 AND lv.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY lv.sort_order, lv.id
SELECT FROM lookup_value WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND delete_flag = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order, id

SELECT lv. FROM lookup_value lv INNER JOIN lookup_type lt ON lv.type_id = lt.id WHERE lt.type_code = #{typeCode} AND lv.parent_code = #{parentCode} AND lv.delete_flag = 0 AND lv.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY lv.sort_order, lv.id
